{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative Officer",
  "description": "The Princeps Credit Systems Limited is a subsidiary of Princeps Holdings Limited. Today, it is positioned to become Africa&rsquo;s foremost provider in consumer financial services, with one of its product being Creditwallet, a brand with a vision to make borrowing experience stress-free for every salaried worker in Africa by providing quick and easy access to loans with high quality service.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job role


	We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Administrative Officer to support our daily administrative and operational activities.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring smooth office operations, coordinating internal processes, managing vendors, and providing administrative support to various teams.
	The role requires someone who is proactive, smart and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment, capable of prioritizing tasks effectively, and able to close out tasks promptly as they arise.


Responsibilities


	Manage daily office operations to ensure efficiency and smooth workflow.
	Provide administrative support to different departments
	Coordinate office supplies, equipment maintenance, and facility management.
	Handle vendor relationships, service providers, and procurement of office items.
	Process and track administrative requests and ensure timely closure of tasks.
	Maintain organized records of invoices, vendor agreements, and administrative documentation.
	Coordinate meetings, travel arrangements, and logistics for internal and external stakeholders.
	Ensure compliance with company administrative policies and procedures.
	Assist with onboarding and preparation of work tools for new employees including workstation setup and office access.
	Support internal events, employee engagement activities, and company meetings.
	Monitor office expenses and maintain proper documentation for reimbursements and payments.
	Provide weekly report on all activities of the team.
	Respond quickly to operational issues and resolve them with minimal disruption to business activities.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or a related field.
	2 - 4 years of experience in an administrative role, preferably within a FinTech, financial services, or fast-paced corporate environment.
	Proven ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously and close out assignments quickly and efficiently.
	Experience working in a high-pressure and fast-moving environment where responsiveness is critical.
	Strong organizational and time management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	High attention to detail and problem-solving ability.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Teams)
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information professionally.


Salary
N150,000 - N180,000 Monthly.",

Administrative Officer Job at the Princeps Credit Systems Limited




        
    

        
        The Princeps Credit Systems Limited is a subsidiary of Princeps Holdings Limited. Today, it is positioned to become Africa’s foremost provider in consumer financial services, with one of its product being Creditwallet, a brand with a vision to make borrowing experience stress-free for every salaried worker in Africa by providing quick and easy access to loans with high quality service.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Job role
     

            
    




	We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Administrative Officer to support our daily administrative and operational activities.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for ensuring smooth office operations, coordinating internal processes, managing vendors, and providing administrative support to various teams.
	The role requires someone who is proactive, smart and comfortable working in a fast-paced environment, capable of prioritizing tasks effectively, and able to close out tasks promptly as they arise.


Responsibilities


	Manage daily office operations to ensure efficiency and smooth workflow.
	Provide administrative support to different departments
	Coordinate office supplies, equipment maintenance, and facility management.
	Handle vendor relationships, service providers, and procurement of office items.
	Process and track administrative requests and ensure timely closure of tasks.
	Maintain organized records of invoices, vendor agreements, and administrative documentation.
	Coordinate meetings, travel arrangements, and logistics for internal and external stakeholders.
	Ensure compliance with company administrative policies and procedures.
	Assist with onboarding and preparation of work tools for new employees including workstation setup and office access.
	Support internal events, employee engagement activities, and company meetings.
	Monitor office expenses and maintain proper documentation for reimbursements and payments.
	Provide weekly report on all activities of the team.
	Respond quickly to operational issues and resolve them with minimal disruption to business activities.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or a related field.
	2 - 4 years of experience in an administrative role, preferably within a FinTech, financial services, or fast-paced corporate environment.
	Proven ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously and close out assignments quickly and efficiently.
	Experience working in a high-pressure and fast-moving environment where responsiveness is critical.
	Strong organizational and time management skills.
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
	High attention to detail and problem-solving ability.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint, Teams)
	Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information professionally.


Salary
N150,000 - N180,000 Monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketer",
  "description": "MMT Consults is a dynamic Human Resource Consulting and General Services firm dedicated to delivering innovative, practical, and sustainable solutions that empower organizations to achieve excellence. We partner with businesses across diverse sectors to optimize their people, processes, and performance, ensuring growth, efficiency, and long-term success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location: Kubwa, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
Increase Supermarket Coverage:


	Visit supermarkets across Abuja daily.
	Register Eliana ONI Enterprise as a supplier in more supermarkets.
	Ensure every supermarket stocks the perfume oils.
	Open new accounts in estates, pharmacies, cosmetic shops, and mini-markets.
	Target: Add 10&ndash;20 new outlets every month.


Build Relationships With Store Owners:


	Many sales are won through relationships.
	The marketer should:
	
		Meet managers regularly.
		Follow up on stock levels.
		Ensure shelves never run out of stock.
		Negotiate better shelf placement.
	
	
	Strong retailer relationships often improve distribution success and long-term sales growth.


Create Brand Awareness:


	Many people don&#39;t know they can buy quality perfume oil for as low as ?375
	Collect Orders and Follow Up
	The marketer should:
	Call supermarkets weekly.
	Visit key stores regularly.
	Confirm stock availability.
	Collect repeat orders before products run out.


Benefits


	Incentives aside salaries
	N50,000 monthly transport allowance
	5% of ur salaries if your supermarkets were able to make payment of there goods after the 1month grace of payment given to them
	10% of ur salaries if you are able to meet up to ur target monthly
	50% of your salaries if you are able to meet your target consecutively after 3month.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested candidates who meets the basic requirement for the role can send application to: mmtconsults@gmail.com using the Job Position as subject of the mail

Note: Regular outlet coverage and route planning help distributors increase sales and improve retailer retention.",

Marketer Job at MMT Consults




        
    

        
        MMT Consults is a dynamic Human Resource Consulting and General Services firm dedicated to delivering innovative, practical, and sustainable solutions that empower organizations to achieve excellence. We partner with businesses across diverse sectors to optimize their people, processes, and performance, ensuring growth, efficiency, and long-term success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location: Kubwa, Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Responsibilities
Increase Supermarket Coverage:
     

            
    




	Visit supermarkets across Abuja daily.
	Register Eliana ONI Enterprise as a supplier in more supermarkets.
	Ensure every supermarket stocks the perfume oils.
	Open new accounts in estates, pharmacies, cosmetic shops, and mini-markets.
	Target: Add 10–20 new outlets every month.


Build Relationships With Store Owners:


	Many sales are won through relationships.
	The marketer should:
	
		Meet managers regularly.
		Follow up on stock levels.
		Ensure shelves never run out of stock.
		Negotiate better shelf placement.
	
	
	Strong retailer relationships often improve distribution success and long-term sales growth.


Create Brand Awareness:


	Many people don't know they can buy quality perfume oil for as low as ?375
	Collect Orders and Follow Up
	The marketer should:
	Call supermarkets weekly.
	Visit key stores regularly.
	Confirm stock availability.
	Collect repeat orders before products run out.


Benefits


	Incentives aside salaries
	N50,000 monthly transport allowance
	5% of ur salaries if your supermarkets were able to make payment of there goods after the 1month grace of payment given to them
	10% of ur salaries if you are able to meet up to ur target monthly
	50% of your salaries if you are able to meet your target consecutively after 3month.


Method of Application 
Interested candidates who meets the basic requirement for the role can send application to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the mail

Note: Regular outlet coverage and route planning help distributors increase sales and improve retailer retention.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

	The Digital Marketing Officer will be responsible for developing and executing digital marketing strategies that drive brand awareness, generate qualified leads, and convert prospects into customers for the company&#39;s ERP Solutions and ISO Learning Solutions.
	The role requires expertise in performance marketing, SEO, content creation, AI-powered marketing, campaign optimization, and lead nurturing across multiple digital channels.

	Create engaging, conversion-driven content for websites, email campaigns, social media, and other digital channels.
	Leverage AI tools to enhance content creation, audience targeting, campaign performance, and marketing automation.
	Monitor campaign performance, analyze key marketing metrics, and optimize ROI.
	Conduct market and competitor analysis to identify opportunities for business growth and product positioning.

	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business Administration, or a related field.
	3-5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Growth Marketing, or Performance Marketing.

Digital Marketing Officer Job at Smart Partners Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        Smart Partners Consulting Limited (SPCL) is an indigenous consulting firm poised on the business model of collaboration to provide professional services of Human Resources and Business Strategy to different companies in various sectors of Nigeria’s economy. It was incorporated in July 2013. Our idea of collaboration and partnership involves the synergy of tested experts in the market place to research, identify and proffer solutions to the ever dynamic needs of our Clients.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing Officer

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The Digital Marketing Officer will be responsible for developing and executing digital marketing strategies that drive brand awareness, generate qualified leads, and convert prospects into customers for the company's ERP Solutions and ISO Learning Solutions.
	The role requires expertise in performance marketing, SEO, content creation, AI-powered marketing, campaign optimization, and lead nurturing across multiple digital channels.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute integrated digital marketing campaigns to promote the company's ERP Solutions and ISO Learning Solutions.
	Generate high-quality leads through digital campaigns, lead magnets, landing pages, and marketing funnels.
	Qualify, nurture, and convert marketing leads into sales opportunities through effective follow-up, email marketing, and CRM management.
	Plan, execute, and optimize both organic and paid campaigns across Google, Meta, LinkedIn, and other relevant digital platforms.
	Implement SEO strategies to improve website visibility, search rankings, and organic traffic.
	Create engaging, conversion-driven content for websites, email campaigns, social media, and other digital channels.
	Leverage AI tools to enhance content creation, audience targeting, campaign performance, and marketing automation.
	Monitor campaign performance, analyze key marketing metrics, and optimize ROI.
	Conduct market and competitor analysis to identify opportunities for business growth and product positioning.


Qualifications


	Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business Administration, or a related field.
	3-5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Growth Marketing, or Performance Marketing.
	Experience marketing B2B technology solutions, SaaS, ERP systems, or professional training services is an added advantage.


Core Competencies:


	Digital Marketing Strategy
	Lead Generation & Lead Conversion
	Marketing Funnels & Lead Magnets
	Paid Advertising (Google, Meta & LinkedIn)
	Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
	Content Marketing & Copywriting
	CRM & Lead Nurturing
	Marketing Analytics & Reporting
	AI-Powered Marketing Tools
	Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)
	Strong analytical, communication, and stakeholder management skills.


Salary
N200,000 Net Monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Restaurant Manager",
  "description": "Brit Properties Nigeria Limited is a property development company incorporated in Nigeria by Companies and Allied Matters Act. Our primary business interests are land, infrastructure/property development, land survey, property marketing and estate agency. We strive to provide exceptional customer service while offering our clients the best property options. We are committed to making good property decision for both existing and potential clients.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Restaurant Manager
Job Location: Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Restaurant Manager to oversee the daily operations of our restaurant.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring exceptional customer service, managing staff, maintaining high food quality and hygiene standards, and driving business profitability.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day operations of the restaurant.
	Lead, supervise, and motivate restaurant staff to deliver excellent customer service.
	Recruit, train, schedule, and evaluate team members.
	Ensure compliance with food safety, hygiene, and health regulations.
	Monitor inventory levels and coordinate the ordering of food, beverages, and supplies.
	Manage budgets, control costs, and optimize profitability.
	Handle customer inquiries, complaints, and feedback professionally.
	Prepare operational and financial reports for management.
	Ensure the restaurant is clean, organized, and maintained to a high standard.
	Implement strategies to improve customer satisfaction and increase sales.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree or HND in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or a related field is an advantage.
	Minimum of 3&ndash;5 years of experience in restaurant management or a similar leadership role.
	Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Excellent customer service and problem-solving abilities.
	Good financial and inventory management skills.
	Ability to&nbsp;&nbsp;work under pressure and manage multiple priorities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and restaurant point-of-sale (POS) systems is an added advantage.


Skills and Competencies:


	Leadership and team management
	Customer relationship management
	Organizational and time management
	Financial and analytical skills
	Decision-making and problem-solving
	Attention to detail
	Excellent verbal and written communication


What We Offer


	Salary: N200,000 - N250,000 Monthly.
	Performance-based incentives
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development
	Supportive and dynamic work environment


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to: onedibe.kosisochukwu@britproperties.ng using &quot;Restaurant Manager Application&quot; as the subject of their email.",

Restaurant Manager Job at Brit Properties Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Brit Properties Nigeria Limited is a property development company incorporated in Nigeria by Companies and Allied Matters Act. Our primary business interests are land, infrastructure/property development, land survey, property marketing and estate agency. We strive to provide exceptional customer service while offering our clients the best property options. We are committed to making good property decision for both existing and potential clients.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Restaurant Manager
Job Location: Ajah, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time 

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking an experienced and results-driven Restaurant Manager to oversee the daily operations of our restaurant.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring exceptional customer service, managing staff, maintaining high food quality and hygiene standards, and driving business profitability.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the day-to-day operations of the restaurant.
	Lead, supervise, and motivate restaurant staff to deliver excellent customer service.
	Recruit, train, schedule, and evaluate team members.
	Ensure compliance with food safety, hygiene, and health regulations.
	Monitor inventory levels and coordinate the ordering of food, beverages, and supplies.
	Manage budgets, control costs, and optimize profitability.
	Handle customer inquiries, complaints, and feedback professionally.
	Prepare operational and financial reports for management.
	Ensure the restaurant is clean, organized, and maintained to a high standard.
	Implement strategies to improve customer satisfaction and increase sales.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree or HND in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or a related field is an advantage.
	Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in restaurant management or a similar leadership role.
	Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Excellent customer service and problem-solving abilities.
	Good financial and inventory management skills.
	Ability to  work under pressure and manage multiple priorities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office and restaurant point-of-sale (POS) systems is an added advantage.


Skills and Competencies:


	Leadership and team management
	Customer relationship management
	Organizational and time management
	Financial and analytical skills
	Decision-making and problem-solving
	Attention to detail
	Excellent verbal and written communication


What We Offer


	Salary: N200,000 - N250,000 Monthly.
	Performance-based incentives
	Opportunities for career growth and professional development
	Supportive and dynamic work environment


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and a cover letter to: [email protected] using "Restaurant Manager Application" as the subject of their email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Customer Care Personnel (NYSC) Job at Marvel Advisory




        
    

        
        Marvel Advisory is a recruitment agency that was founded in 2018 by a team of Human Resources and Business Consultants with the aim of transforming the workforce by inspiring productivity, effectiveness, value driven and innovative teams across businesses in Africa.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Customer Care Personnel (NYSC)

Job Location: Lagos Island, Lagos
Employment Type: NYSC (Place of Primary Assignment)
Work Schedule: 5 days a week

About the Role
     

            
    




	We are looking for a smart, friendly, and proactive Customer Care Personnel who is currently serving in the National Youth Service Corps (NYSC). This role is ideal for someone who is passionate about delivering excellent customer service, enjoys solving problems, and is eager to build a career in customer experience.
	This position offers an excellent learning environment with opportunities for growth and career development within the organization.


Key Responsibilities


	Respond to customer inquiries via phone, email, WhatsApp, and social media.
	Resolve customer complaints professionally and promptly.
	Provide accurate information about the company's products and services.
	Follow up with customers to ensure issues are resolved satisfactorily.
	Maintain accurate records of customer interactions.
	Escalate complex issues to the appropriate department when necessary.
	Work closely with other teams to ensure excellent customer satisfaction.
	Support other administrative and customer service tasks as assigned.


Requirements


	Must be a currently serving NYSC Corps Member seeking a Place of Primary Assignment (PPA).
	Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
	Strong interpersonal and problem-solving skills.
	Good knowledge of Microsoft Office and basic computer applications.
	Ability to multitask and work in a fast-paced environment.
	Professional, courteous, and customer-focused attitude.
	Must be based in or willing to work in Lagos.


What We Offer


	Monthly stipend of N70,000.
	Five-day work week.
	A supportive and collaborative work environment.
	Hands-on training and mentorship.
	Clear opportunities for career growth and long-term employment based on performance.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.
